content: Chuck Norris can hear sign language.
Chuck Norris counted to infinity. Twice.
When Chuck Norris does a push-up, he pushes the Earth down.
Chuck Norris can divide by zero (at least according to legend).
Chuck Norris can win a game of Connect Four in three moves.
Chuck Norris once solved a puzzle before opening the box.
Chuck Norris can clap with one hand.
Chuck Norris can dribble a bowling ball.
Chuck Norris can light a fire by staring at ice.
Chuck Norris can finish a jigsaw puzzle from the back side.
Chuck Norris can parallel park a train.
Chuck Norris once beat the sun in a staring contest.
Chuck Norris can fold a fitted sheet perfectly.
Chuck Norris can tie his shoes with his feet.
Chuck Norris can make onions cry.
Chuck Norris can turn a whisper into an echo.
Chuck Norris can close a revolving door.
Chuck Norris can teach silence to speak.
Chuck Norris can read a book by turning it around once.
Chuck Norris can keep a secret from himself.
Chuck Norris can hear sign language.
